N:=68;
X := x^18*y^36
        + 36*x^19*y^35
        + x^5*(x^28 - 2*x^27 + 5*x^26 - 8*x^25 + 14*x^24 - 20*x^23 + 30*x^22 - 40*x^21 + 55*x^20 - 70*x^19 + 91*x^18 - 112*x^17 + 140*x^16 + 462*x^15 + 168*x^14 - 168*x^13 + 140*x^12 - 112*x^11 + 91*x^10 - 70*x^9 + 55*x^8 - 40*x^7 + 30*x^6 - 20*x^5 + 14*x^4 - 8*x^3 + 5*x^2 - 2*x + 1)*y^34
        + x^5*(21*x^29 - 31*x^28 + 63*x^27 - 57*x^26 + 70*x^25 - 18*x^24 - 6*x^23 + 106*x^22 - 141*x^21 + 231*x^20 - 175*x^19 + 105*x^18 + 252*x^17 + 6384*x^16 + 504*x^15 - 504*x^14 - 196*x^13 + 700*x^12 - 819*x^11 + 889*x^10 - 741*x^9 + 651*x^8 - 446*x^7 + 346*x^6 - 186*x^5 + 134*x^4 - 45*x^3 + 39*x^2 - 3*x + 13)*y^33
        + 3*x^5*(70*x^30 - 70*x^29 + 95*x^28 + 57*x^27 - 145*x^26 + 423*x^25 - 480*x^24 + 679*x^23 - 434*x^22 + 263*x^21 + 659*x^20 - 1702*x^19 + 4131*x^18 + 12221*x^17 + 6532*x^16 - 7176*x^15 + 4068*x^14 - 1870*x^13 + 1513*x^12- 932*x^11 + 1165*x^10 - 727*x^9 + 886*x^8 - 421*x^7 + 532*x^6 - 149*x^5 + 273*x^4 - 9*x^3 + 117*x^2 + 40*x + 26)*y^32
        + x^5*(1330*x^31 - 770*x^30 + 35*x^29 + 3839*x^28 - 4925*x^27 + 7531*x^26 - 3504*x^25 + 1950*x^24 + 7664*x^23 - 11222*x^22 + 26271*x^21 - 37819*x^20 + 81281*x^19 + 223827*x^18 + 96132*x^17 - 102220*x^16 + 5900*x^15 + 50812*x^14 - 42499*x^13 + 42255*x^12 - 19013*x^11 + 21057*x^10 - 4314*x^9 + 11456*x^8 + 962*x^7 + 7184*x^6 + 2789*x^5 + 4397*x^4 + 2657*x^3 + 2717*x^2 + 946*x + 286)*y^31

        + 3*(165*x^50 - 66*x^49 - 2673*x^48 - 3960*x^47 + 11088*x^46 + 48356*x^45 + 102102*x^44 - 422145*x^43 - 580758*x^42 + 2658594*x^41 - 1332274*x^40 - 10840742*x^39 + 8907038*x^38 + 34946001*x^37 - 6187056*x^36 - 66588963*x^35 - 29003202*x^34 + 75050984*x^33 + 67661482*x^32 - 18955235*x^31 - 44008917*x^30 - 217348105*x^29 + 317793611*x^28 + 361266822*x^27 - 286279387*x^26 + 151377874*x^25 + 153316495*x^24 - 142468182*x^23- 264033022*x^22 + 201016848*x^21 + 71684678*x^20 + 227124877*x^19 - 79124224*x^18 + 241143786*x^17 - 63966104*x^16 + 278855641*x^15 - 64440151*x^14 + 223968129*x^13 - 31316057*x^12 + 112569947*x^11 + 7637176*x^10 + 34098656*x^9 + 9084376*x^8 + 7517450*x^7 + 2700414*x^6 + 1213623*x^5 + 412000*x^4 + 125290*x^3 + 32980*x^2 + 6120*x + 1020)*y^14
        - (792*x^49 + 132*x^48 - 8580*x^47 - 20724*x^46 + 8360*x^45 + 134277*x^44 + 442481*x^43 - 1242774*x^42 - 720358*x^41 + 8864802*x^40 - 7878470*x^39 - 35537031*x^38 + 16815697*x^37 + 90116271*x^36 + 10617455*x^35 - 127826768*x^34 - 91574776*x^33 + 111150631*x^32 + 142671527*x^31 + 11102117*x^30 - 166677399*x^29 - 734890266*x^28 + 415588982*x^27 + 333359480*x^26 - 599565992*x^25 + 506299398*x^24 + 351575286*x^23 - 209524900*x^22 - 578386104*x^21 + 50075987*x^20 - 243279405*x^19 + 49185314*x^18 - 473246502*x^17 - 8353969*x^16 - 486087849*x^15 + 32580803*x^14 - 405626121*x^13 + 45186921*x^12 - 233447851*x^11 + 13759556*x^10 - 73434268*x^9 - 4923758*x^8 - 13293782*x^7 - 2569729*x^6 - 1610737*x^5 - 426090*x^4 - 133314*x^3 - 31824*x^2 - 5712*x - 816)*y^13
        + (924*x^48 + 792*x^47 - 5643*x^46 - 21813*x^45 - 18161*x^44 + 63609*x^43 + 372359*x^42 - 1183490*x^41 + 520413*x^40 + 9091046*x^39 - 6918586*x^38 - 29721933*x^37 + 4584709*x^36 + 58614597*x^35 + 18662019*x^34 - 66527247*x^33 - 68479602*x^32 + 52078863*x^31 + 123468618*x^30 + 124445430*x^29 + 8973465*x^28 - 418453434*x^27 + 242983302*x^26 - 16716438*x^25 - 417430827*x^24 + 305418742*x^23 + 240591744*x^22 + 50049875*x^21 - 115698530*x^20 + 184071477*x^19 + 71503754*x^18 + 259607929*x^17 + 47334495*x^16 + 245892131*x^15 + 23219095*x^14 + 198083151*x^13 - 13691455*x^12 + 115722221*x^11 - 21800232*x^10 + 41156818*x^9 - 6010346*x^8 +7310238*x^7 - 252430*x^6 + 673054*x^5 + 68202*x^4 + 36278*x^3 + 7140*x^2 + 1224*x + 153)*y^12
        - 3*(264*x^47 + 429*x^46 - 407*x^45 - 4433*x^44 - 7917*x^43 - 442*x^42 + 58992*x^41 - 391128*x^40 + 308258*x^39 + 2493841*x^38 - 1223883*x^37 - 6219613*x^36 - 319921*x^35 + 10451575*x^34 + 5080757*x^33 - 10739249*x^32 - 18438299*x^31 - 3233566*x^30 + 13955504*x^29 + 29787528*x^28 + 20324214*x^27 - 52372110*x^26 + 65259268*x^25 - 20274872*x^24 - 77827046*x^23 + 31608121*x^22 + 13474287*x^21 - 12312179*x^20 - 44405761*x^19 - 15869877*x^18 - 36917057*x^17 - 13001395*x^16 - 36239159*x^15 - 6909271*x^14 - 25001803*x^13 + 2269171*x^12 - 13641801*x^11 + 4802078*x^10 - 5850882*x^9 + 2158786*x^8 - 1301718*x^7 + 313698*x^6 - 118866*x^5 + 11534*x^4 - 3690*x^3 - 332*x^2 - 54*x - 6)*y^11
        + (495*x^46 + 1210*x^45 + 1573*x^44 - 2782*x^43 - 10387*x^42 - 14402*x^41 + 42589*x^40 - 1011653*x^39 + 628573*x^38 + 4605523*x^37 - 1447447*x^36 - 9421674*x^35 - 1782602*x^34 + 15410917*x^33 + 13369092*x^32 - 6230373*x^31 - 26748691*x^30 - 22102752*x^29 - 6679303*x^28 + 21438227*x^27 + 21722987*x^26 - 61742878*x^25 + 120106067*x^24 - 28871775*x^23 - 75616440*x^22 + 59017700*x^21 + 48742672*x^20 + 41020005*x^19 + 16729225*x^18 + 45565435*x^17 + 21975875*x^16 + 37083761*x^15 + 5433773*x^14 + 19742756*x^13 - 4990979*x^12 + 10557881*x^11 - 6089522*x^10 + 5717154*x^9 - 3313774*x^8 + 1854556*x^7 - 690404*x^6 + 222255*x^5 - 42438*x^4 + 6755*x^3 + 65*x^2 + 10*x + 1)*y^10
        - x^3*(220*x^42 + 726*x^41 + 1818*x^40 + 2260*x^39 + 2092*x^38 + 819*x^37 + 13831*x^36 - 653669*x^35 + 304359*x^34 + 2170282*x^33 - 545830*x^32 - 4359849*x^31 - 2089881*x^30 + 5341551*x^29 + 7940523*x^28 + 3899770*x^27- 4172978*x^26 - 6911733*x^25 - 5664845*x^24 + 2367068*x^23 + 2671896*x^22 - 27425899*x^21 + 49124997*x^20 - 24332568*x^19 - 38033948*x^18 - 1869703*x^17 - 9195279*x^16 - 11161185*x^15 - 16513485*x^14 - 5829255*x^13 - 7384255*x^12 + 873218*x^11 - 3359874*x^10 + 2130821*x^9 - 2273799*x^8 + 1728306*x^7 - 1509270*x^6 + 1042644*x^5 - 689436*x^4 + 313929*x^3 - 119691*x^2 + 27027*x - 5005)*y^9
        + 3*x^3*(22*x^41 + 92*x^40 + 305*x^39 + 691*x^38 + 1435*x^37 + 2615*x^36 + 5360*x^35 - 102998*x^34 + 52613*x^33 + 292990*x^32 - 23121*x^31 - 564973*x^30 - 520645*x^29 + 170043*x^28 + 714013*x^27 + 715805*x^26 + 162746*x^25 - 261875*x^24 - 362370*x^23 + 227187*x^22 + 442537*x^21 - 2164929*x^20 + 7820666*x^19 - 679931*x^18 - 675175*x^17 + 2320699*x^16 + 1440263*x^15 + 864057*x^14 - 76080*x^13 + 200741*x^12 - 186934*x^11 +211377*x^10 - 121844*x^9 + 183417*x^8 - 97843*x^7 + 120274*x^6 - 69253*x^5 + 62854*x^4 - 31207*x^3 + 16159*x^2 - 4004*x + 1001)*y^8
        - x^3*(12*x^40 + 61*x^39 + 241*x^38 + 701*x^37 + 1813*x^36 + 4130*x^35 + 8932*x^34 - 116160*x^33 + 73274*x^32 + 318349*x^31 + 114649*x^30 - 400391*x^29 - 556823*x^28 - 245889*x^27 + 232657*x^26 + 431589*x^25 + 248671*x^24 - 223607*x^23 - 679939*x^22 - 1033307*x^21 - 1577019*x^20 - 4166293*x^19 + 4634535*x^18 - 3129767*x^17 - 1952311*x^16 + 256671*x^15 + 185697*x^14 + 138097*x^13 - 247201*x^12 - 98157*x^11 - 260291*x^10- 49851*x^9 - 159781*x^8 + 3298*x^7 - 86440*x^6 + 19812*x^5 - 41222*x^4 + 15709*x^3 - 14313*x^2 + 3549*x - 1365)*y^7
        + x^3*(x^39 + 6*x^38 + 27*x^37 + 92*x^36 + 273*x^35 + 714*x^34 + 1715*x^33 - 38688*x^32 + 18633*x^31 + 84248*x^30 + 70171*x^29 - 42468*x^28 - 100384*x^27 - 89470*x^26 + 24786*x^25 + 130352*x^24 + 241437*x^23 + 264636*x^22 + 283867*x^21 + 198469*x^20 + 38613*x^19 - 612429*x^18 + 1474851*x^17 - 565587*x^16 - 202932*x^15 + 130460*x^14 + 149796*x^13 + 152318*x^12 + 92798*x^11 + 87846*x^10 + 45708*x^9 + 48120*x^8 + 19167*x^7 + 23310*x^6 + 4937*x^5 + 9417*x^4 - 86*x^3 + 3159*x^2 - 546*x + 455)*y^6
        + 3*x^3*(3542*x^31 - 506*x^30 - 4416*x^29 - 5816*x^28 + 694*x^27 + 5770*x^26 + 11696*x^25 + 10436*x^24 + 9546*x^23 + 2618*x^22 + 265*x^21 - 5375*x^20 - 585*x^19 + 8135*x^18 + 47417*x^17 - 90131*x^16 + 50472*x^15 + 24672*x^14 + 13242*x^13 + 10386*x^12 + 8110*x^11 + 7646*x^10 + 5676*x^9 + 4776*x^8 + 2928*x^7 + 2208*x^6 + 1041*x^5 + 761*x^4 + 221*x^3 + 193*x^2 + 7*x + 35)*y^5
        - x^3*(2024*x^30 + 92*x^29 - 1460*x^28 - 3637*x^27 - 2218*x^26 - 1497*x^25 + 1730*x^24 + 2172*x^23 + 4049*x^22 + 1996*x^21 + 1891*x^20 - 1581*x^19 - 383*x^18 + 795*x^17 + 13759*x^16 - 54670*x^15 + 10182*x^14 - 3356*x^13 - 5494*x^12 - 5863*x^11 - 5358*x^10 - 4168*x^9 - 3118*x^8 - 2033*x^7 - 1323*x^6 - 718*x^5 - 413*x^4 - 173*x^3 - 93*x^2 - 24*x - 15)*y^4
        + x^3*(276*x^29 + 84*x^28 - 6*x^27 - 368*x^26 - 384*x^25 - 590*x^24 - 383*x^23 - 417*x^22 - 47*x^21 - x^20 + 465*x^19 + 593*x^18 + 1283*x^17 + 1791*x^16 + 3230*x^15 - 4966*x^14 + 2766*x^13 + 1122*x^12 + 886*x^11 + 630*x^10 + 434*x^9 + 294*x^8 + 189*x^7 + 119*x^6 + 69*x^5 + 39*x^4 + 19*x^3 + 9*x^2 + 3*x + 1)*y^3
        - 3*x^14*(8*x^17 + 5*x^16 + 7*x^15 - x^14 - 2*x^13 - 12*x^12 - 13*x^11 - 22*x^10 - 20*x^9 - 25*x^8 - 17*x^7 - 15*x^6 + 2*x^5 + 14*x^4 + 43*x^3 - 192*x^2 + 32*x - 2)*y^2
        + x^14*(x^16 + x^15 + 2*x^14 + 2*x^13 + 3*x^12 + 3*x^11 + 4*x^10 + 4*x^9 + 5*x^8 + 5*x^7 + 6*x^6 + 6*x^5 + 7*x^4 + 7*x^3 + 8*x^2 - 32*x + 4)*y
        + x^14;
q := (x*y - x - y - 1)/(x*y + x + y + 1);
t := (-x*y + x + y + 1)/(x*y + x - y - 1);
E:=[1,(q^2-1)*(t^2-1)/16,(q^2-1)*(t^2-1)/16,0,0];
P:=[(q+1)*(t^2-1)/8,(q+1)^2*(t-1)^2*(t+1)/32];
